installCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install tailwindcss@3
buildCommand: npx tailwindcss -i shop/static/shop/css/input.css -o shop/static/shop/css/tailwind.min.css --minify && SECRET_KEY=build-temp-key python manage.py migrate --noinput && SECRET_KEY=build-temp-key python manage.py seed_data && SECRET_KEY=build-temp-key python manage.py collectstatic --noinput
